mapper.select: SELECT id, area, place, location, barcode, product, itemCode, itemName, baseQty, inQty, outQty, regDate FROM INVENTORY ORDER BY area, CAST(place AS UNSIGNED), place, location
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INVENTORY (area, place, location, barcode, product, itemCode, itemName, baseQty, inQty, outQty, regDate) VALUES (#{area}, #{place}, #{location}, #{barcode}, #{product}, #{itemCode}, #{itemName}, #{baseQty}, #{inQty}, #{outQty}, now())
mapper.update: UPDATE INVENTORY SET inQty = inQty + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE INVENTORY SET outQty = outQty + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
